title: rubus × castoreus
intro: Rubus × castoreus, also known as the Castle Spice or Himalayan Raspberry, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of Rubus × castoreus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Rubus × castoreus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
